meta.description: KED-OS index — projects, skills, snippets, memory, core docs

projects.name: New Directory Pages
projects.description: Multi-county mineral rights professionals directory for MRF, driven by Google Sheets via Apps Script, deployed per-county to Cloudflare Pages.

projects.name: Bakken
projects.description: Oil & gas site for the Bakken region, built from scraped HTML with Decap CMS for frontend content editing. No git remote yet.

projects.name: MRF Custom CSS & Scripts
projects.description: Custom CSS and JavaScript for MineralRightsForum Discourse forum. Organized into common, desktop, and mobile partials.

projects.name: Mineralwise Astro
projects.description: Private Astro project for Mineralwise. Details TBD — clone before working on it.

projects.name: County Category Header
projects.description: Discourse theme component that adds county header images to MRF category pages.

projects.name: Discourse Allow PM to Staff
projects.description: Discourse plugin that allows forum members to send PMs to staff regardless of trust level restrictions.

projects.name: List Pages
projects.description: Astro-based list/directory pages for MRF (testimonials and similar), same architecture as new-directory-pages.

projects.name: County Directory Pages (Legacy)
projects.description: Predecessor to new-directory-pages. Multi-county MRF directory, same architecture but without single-spreadsheet migration or Decap CMS.

projects.name: Reeves County Texas (Legacy)
projects.description: Original single-county MRF directory for Reeves County, TX. Likely superseded by new-directory-pages (Reeves County exists in sites.json).

skills.name: Code Verification
skills.when: After any AI-generated code session — security, optimization, and traceability passes.

skills.name: Security Audit
skills.when: Auditing any code — existing, inherited, legacy, or third-party.

skills.name: Project Initialization
skills.when: Setting up a new KED project folder from the _template.

skills.name: KED Industry News
skills.when: Weekly O&G / mineral rights / drilling news prep.

skills.name: Voice Profile
skills.when: Writing client-facing copy, emails, proposals, or content on Kenny's behalf.

core.name: KED Technology Stack
core.description: Technologies, frameworks, and tools used in KED projects. Load for code or architecture sessions.

core.name: Astro Patterns & Standards
core.description: Conventions and patterns for Astro projects at KED. Load when building or reviewing Astro code.

memory.name: Kenny Dubose
memory.description: Kenny's voice profile and communication preferences. Load before any client-facing writing.

memory.name: Chris Malone
memory.description: Chris's role, preferences, and working style.

memory.name: Company Context
memory.description: KED Interests company background and context.

memory.name: Glossary
memory.description: KED-specific terms, acronyms, and industry vocabulary.

memory.name: Radar
memory.description: Technology and industry radar — what to watch, explore, or adopt.

decisions.summary: Adopted EOS and session-start routines mirroring brilliant-os pattern.
Sonnet as default model; always prompt for upgrade/downgrade at session start.
